_confidence_notes: PDF-verified against gin7manual_djvu.txt OCR (the verbatim text layer of .omo/work/gin7manual/gin7manual.pdf): Phezzan/production OCR lines 1967-2008, warehouses 2011-2033, allocation (割当) 2042-2079, reorganization (再編成) 2085-2113, replenishment (補充) 2116-2163.

OCR printed footer numbers run ~one or two behind the manual's stated pages: Phezzan/production sit on OCR footer p38-40 (lines 1964/2008), warehouses footer p41 (line 2039), 割当 footer p42 (line 2082), 再編成+補充 footer p43-44 (lines 2144/2166). Consistent with digest §8 pp.41-45.

§8.2 fractional/auto-merge note (digest flagged extraction-uncertain): OCR lines 2032-2033 are intact in meaning — '再編成は補充によって、残り隻数が端数になっているユニットが部隊倉庫内で発生した場合、再編成または補充を実行した時点で、自動的にユニットの合算が行われます。' Verified, not garbled.

Allocation authority table (割当を実行する職務と担当, OCR lines 2052-2056) recovered: columns 艦隊/巡察隊/輸送艦隊/地上部隊. Row 1 統帥本部作戦一課長 = O X X X; Row 2 統帥本部作戦二課長 = X O O O. Row 3 is OCR-garbled ('統合作戦本部第三次長 還識本 O O') — only the last two cells (輸送艦隊/地上部隊 = O O) are legible; first two cells could not be read. Marked _uncertain.

The third allocation role label is OCR-uncertain: rendered '統合作戦本部第三次長'. Empire-side作戦課 vs 統合作戦本部 (Alliance) split is plausible but the exact post name for row 3 is not confidently recoverable from OCR. Marked _uncertain.

OCR misreads corrected: 造兵工廠 appears as 造兵工厳/造兵工茂/造兵工厳 (line 1979-1980); 募兵 as 募兵 (clear); 修練度 as 修練度 (clear); 要塞 frequently as 要寒/要泰 (recognized variant); 商船 (line 2162) confirms merchant-ship crew exemption.
Sweep range '400 ly' (line 1958) OCR-rendered as '400 兆 年' = misread of 400光年 (light-years); this belongs to operations §7 (pp.38-40) and is cross-referenced only.

While allocation/reorganize/replenish are active, a 搬出入 (transport in/out) command is mutually excluded (OCR line 2078). 搬出入 itself is documented elsewhere; captured here as a mutual-exclusion lock only.

tax-collection (徴税): the only manual statement on these pages is that manual conscription (募兵) REDUCES a planet's tax income, while automatic production does NOT affect tax (OCR lines 1987, 2001). No tax-rate formula appears on pp.41-45.

neutralityRule.ja: いずれかの陣営がフェザーンの中立を侵犯したり、武力占領を行ったりした場合は、特別なペナルティが与えられます。
neutralityRule.en: If any faction violates Phezzan's neutrality or carries out armed occupation, a special penalty is imposed.
neutralityRule.ko: 어느 진영이든 페잔의 중립을 침범하거나 무력 점령하면 특별 페널티가 부과된다.

_unimplemented.ja: フェザーン占領は現在未実装となっております
_unimplemented.en: Phezzan occupation is currently unimplemented (現在未実装).

shipProduction.rule: Ship units are only built at the 造兵工廠 (arsenal) inside a planet/fortress. Planets/fortresses WITHOUT an arsenal cannot produce units.

soldierProduction.ja: 兵士(乗組員,陸戦兵)の生産
soldierProduction.rule: Soldiers are produced by conscripting (募兵) from the population living on a planet. Possible on ANY habitable, populated planet.

taxEffect.ja: 募兵を行って兵士を生産すると、その惑星の徴税収入は減収となります。
taxEffect.en: Performing 募兵 to produce soldiers REDUCES that planet's tax income (徴税収入).
taxEffect.ko: 모병으로 병사를 생산하면 해당 행성의 징세 수입이 감소한다.

proficiency.improvesBy: Training (訓練) or accumulating real combat experience (実戦経験).

newlyProducedTier.note: Newly produced soldiers are always Green.

automaticProduction.rule: In the current version, ship units and soldiers are produced AUTOMATICALLY and continuously; no role/post exists that can change (toggle) this setting.

continuesUntilOwnershipChanges.ja: 当該惑星/要塞の支配権が移行しない限り、生産し続ける。
continuesUntilOwnershipChanges.en: Auto-production continues as long as ownership of that planet/fortress does not change.

taxEffect.ja: 自動生産で生産されている限りは、惑星の税収等には影響は及ぼしません。
taxEffect.en: Auto-produced units do NOT affect a planet's tax/revenue (unlike manual 募兵).
taxEffect.ko: 자동 생산은 행성 세수에 영향을 주지 않는다(수동 모병과 달리).

managedBy.note: All units and materiel stored here are managed entirely by the central government.

warehouses.autoDeposit: Units and materiel completed by the planet/fortress are auto-deposited here on completion.

warehouses.accessRule: Items stored here cannot be moved by other units; only the owning unit may freely take items in/out.

pooledException.ja: 巡察隊および地上部隊の部隊倉庫
pooledException.rule: Patrol squadrons (巡察隊) and ground units (地上部隊) do NOT have per-unit isolated warehouses — they all share ONE pooled unit warehouse, and any such unit may take items in/out of it.

autoMergeFractionalUnits.ja: 再編成または補充によって、残り隻数が端数になっているユニットが部隊倉庫内で発生した場合、再編成または補充を実行した時点で、自動的にユニットの合算が行われます。
autoMergeFractionalUnits.en: When reorganize/replenish leaves fractional/partial-strength units in the unit warehouse, the units are auto-merged (合算) at the moment reorganize or replenish is executed.
autoMergeFractionalUnits.ko: 재편성/보충으로 부대 창고 내에 우수리(단수) 유닛이 생기면, 재편성·보충 실행 시점에 자동으로 합산된다.
autoMergeFractionalUnits.uncertainNote: Digest §8.2 flagged this as extraction-uncertain; OCR (lines 2032-2033) confirms the meaning is intact.

overview.ja: 割当とは、惑星/要塞に保管されている各ユニット(艦艇,陸戦隊,乗組員)および軍需物資を特定の部隊に与えることです。
overview.en: Allocation gives units (ships, ground troops, crew) and military materiel stored in a planet/fortress (planet warehouse) to a specific unit's (unit) warehouse.
overview.ko: 할당은 행성/요새(행성 창고)에 보관된 유닛(함정·육전대·승조원)과 군수물자를 특정 부대에 부여하는 것.
overview.direction: planet warehouse (惑星倉庫) -> unit warehouse (部隊倉庫)

prerequisite.ja: 割当によって部隊倉庫にユニットを割り当ててもらわない限り、各部隊は補充も再編成も行うことができません。
prerequisite.en: Unless a unit's warehouse has been given items via allocation, that unit can perform NEITHER replenishment (補充) NOR reorganization (再編成).
prerequisite.ko: 할당으로 부대 창고에 유닛을 받지 못하면, 해당 부대는 보충도 재편성도 할 수 없다.

authorityTable.ja: 割当を実行する職務と担当
authorityTable.en: Roles authorized to execute allocation, by target-unit category

role.ja: 統合作戦本部第三次長 (?)

rows.uncertainNote: OCR line 2056 garbled ('統合作戦本部第三次長 還識本 O O'). Role label uncertain; first two cells (艦隊/巡察隊) unreadable, only last two cells legible.

procedure: Select the corresponding job-authority card (職務権限カード) and left-click [割当]; a submenu appears.
Left-click to designate the target unit (部隊) to allocate to; a submenu appears.
Select the object to allocate (unit / military materiel) and set the move amount with a slider. Multiple objects can be set to one target unit at once.
A confirmation dialog appears; if the allocation is acceptable, click the [決定] (Confirm) button.

rules: Allocation cannot be executed while ANY unit is running a [再編成] (reorganize) or [補充] (replenish) command.
While a [割当] command is running, the 再編成 / 補充 / 搬出入 (reorganize / replenish / transport-in-out) commands cannot be executed.

overview.ja: 再編成とは、自らが率いている部隊のユニットを、惑星/要塞内の部隊倉庫との間で移動させることです。
overview.en: Reorganization moves a commander's own unit's units between the unit and the unit warehouse inside a planet/fortress.
overview.ko: 재편성은 자신이 이끄는 부대의 유닛을 행성/요새 내 부대 창고와의 사이에서 이동시키는 것.
overview.purpose: Used to compose units that have vacancies (欠員) and to change a unit's composition (構成).

executedBy.ja: 部隊を率いている司令官のキャラクター
executedBy.en: The commander character leading the unit.

procedure: Select the corresponding job-authority card and left-click [再編成]; a submenu appears.
Select the units to move FROM unit TO unit-warehouse and FROM unit-warehouse TO unit, and set move amounts via slider. Multiple unit types can be set at once.
A confirmation dialog appears; if acceptable, click the [決定] (Confirm) button.

caution.rule: Mind the crew-unit count each ship-unit requires. The ship units finally composed into the unit must have the crew units they require.

overview.ja: 補充とは、戦闘によって員数が減った艦艇ユニットや乗組員ユニットに補充を行うことです。
overview.en: Replenishment tops up ship units and crew units whose numbers were reduced by combat.
overview.ko: 보충은 전투로 인원이 줄어든 함정 유닛·승조원 유닛을 보충하는 것.

executedBy.ja: 部隊を率いている司令官

procedure: Select the corresponding job-authority card and left-click [補充]; a submenu opens.
Select the ship unit or crew unit to replenish and left-click [OK]; a list of same-ship-class units appears.
From the list, left-click the unit to actually replenish. NOTE: replenishment can only be done one ship-class at a time (補充は1艦種ごとでしか行えません).
If the replenish count is acceptable, left-click the [決定] (Confirm) button.

rules.ja: 補充元の艦艇ユニットは、部隊倉庫内に存在する補充先の艦種ユニットと完全に同タイプでなければなりません。
rules.en: The source ship-unit must be EXACTLY the same ship class as the destination in the unit warehouse (e.g., to replenish a 巡航艦Ⅰ型 you need 巡航艦Ⅰ型 stock).
rules.ko: 보충원 함정 유닛은 부대 창고 내 보충 대상과 완전히 동일 함종이어야 한다(예: 순항함 I형 보충에는 순항함 I형 재고 필요).

rules.ja: 艦艇を補充した場合、同時に乗組員も補充する必要があります。乗組員ユニットの補充は各艦艇ユニットの乗員効率の値によって変化し、自動的に行われます。
rules.en: When a ship unit is replenished, crew must be replenished at the same time. Crew replenishment is computed from each ship class's 乗員効率 (crew efficiency) value and is performed AUTOMATICALLY.
rules.ko: 함정을 보충하면 동시에 승조원도 보충해야 한다. 승조원 보충은 각 함정의 승원효율 값에 따라 자동으로 이루어진다.

rules.ja: 部隊倉庫内に乗組員ユニットが存在しない場合、部隊に属するすべての艦艇ユニットが機能できない事態が発生する場合があり、この場合は【決定】ボタンをクリックすることができません。
rules.en: If the unit warehouse has ZERO crew units, the unit's ships would become unmanned/non-functional; in that case the [決定] (Confirm) button is DISABLED.
rules.ko: 부대 창고에 승조원 유닛이 없으면 함정이 무인 상태가 될 수 있어, 이 경우 [결정] 버튼이 비활성화된다.

rules.ja: 商船ユニットに限り、乗組員ユニットを必要としませんので、上記の制限は課せられません。
rules.en: Merchant ships (商船) alone require NO crew units, so the crew rules above do not apply to them.
rules.ko: 상선 유닛만은 승조원 유닛이 필요 없어 위 제한이 적용되지 않는다.

taxCollection._note: No tax-rate formula appears on manual pp.41-45. The only tax statements here are the production tax effects.

rules.rule: Manual conscription (募兵) to produce soldiers REDUCES that planet's tax income (徴税収入は減収).
Automatic production does NOT affect a planet's tax/revenue.
